sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content VARCHAR);
UPDATE xml_data SET content = 'virt://WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES.RES_FULL_PATH.RES_CONTENT:/DAV/xmlsource/updated.xml' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xslt('virt://WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES.RES_FULL_PATH.RES_CONTENT:/DAV/stylesheets/mysheet.xsl', xtree_doc(content)) FROM xml_data WHERE id = 1;
